title: chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. arcticum
intro: Chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. arcticum, also known as the Northern Chrysanthemum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. arcticum include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in herbal preparations such as poultices and compresses to treat skin conditions and wounds.
